description: Read-only manifest of selected Logic Lab algorithms for AI agents and MCP search.

entries.title: Sphere Raymarching
entries.visual_use: Use for 3D sphere rendering with diffuse lighting via raymarching. Foundation for all SDF-based 3D art.

entries.title: Rotating Sphere Raymarching
entries.visual_use: Animated rotating 3D sphere with Euler rotation. Good starting point for animated SDF scenes.

entries.title: Box Raymarching
entries.visual_use: Use for rendering 3D boxes and rectangular forms via SDF raymarching.

entries.title: Diffuse Lighting (Raymarching)
entries.visual_use: Demonstrates normal-based diffuse shading in a raymarched scene. Use as lighting template.

entries.title: Noise-Textured Raymarching
entries.visual_use: Raymarched 3D scene with procedural noise texture. Combines volumetric and noise techniques.

entries.title: Normal Mapping (Raymarching)
entries.visual_use: Surface normal calculation via SDF gradient for bump/normal mapping effects.

entries.title: Silhouette Raymarching
entries.visual_use: Render 3D shape silhouettes and outlines. Use for graphic, contour-focused art styles.

entries.title: 2D Raymarching
entries.visual_use: 2D variant of raymarching using signed distance fields. Great for stylized flat shapes with glow.

entries.title: Fractional Brownian Motion (FBM)
entries.visual_use: Multi-octave noise layering to create natural-looking organic textures. Foundation for cloud, terrain, and fluid art.

entries.title: FBM Domain Warping
entries.visual_use: Warp space itself with FBM to create fluid, marble-like, or atmospheric art. One of the most powerful generative techniques.

entries.title: Rotational Domain Warp
entries.visual_use: Rotation-based domain warping for swirling, spiral, and vortex-like distortions.

entries.title: Noise Blending
entries.visual_use: Blend multiple noise functions with various modes for complex texture layering.

entries.title: Circle SDF (2D)
entries.visual_use: 2D signed distance field for circles. Use for glow, outline, and smooth shape effects.

entries.title: Rectangle SDF (2D)
entries.visual_use: 2D signed distance field for rectangles. Foundation for grid-based and architectural art.

entries.title: Voronoi Metrics (2D)
entries.visual_use: Voronoi diagrams with varied distance metrics (Euclidean, Manhattan, etc.) for diverse cellular art.

entries.title: Lp-norm Voronoi
entries.visual_use: Voronoi with Lp-norm distance for diamond, circular, and intermediate cell shapes.

entries.title: Voronoi Noise
entries.visual_use: Classic Voronoi cellular noise. Use for biological cell patterns, cracked surfaces, stone textures.

entries.title: Worley Noise
entries.visual_use: F1 Worley/cellular noise for skin, scales, stone, and organic surface textures.

entries.title: Layered Worley Noise
entries.visual_use: Multi-octave layered Worley noise for rich, complex organic textures with fine detail.

entries.title: Worley F1-F4 Features
entries.visual_use: Compare F1 through F4 Worley distance features for different cellular art styles.

entries.title: Cellular Noise
entries.visual_use: Cellular noise pattern with grid-based randomness. Use for tile-like or cell-like patterns.

entries.title: Perlin Noise
entries.visual_use: Classic Perlin gradient noise. The most versatile base for natural-looking art: terrain, clouds, and motion.

entries.title: Gradient Noise
entries.visual_use: Smooth gradient-based noise for soft, flowing textures and natural variation.

entries.title: Periodic Noise
entries.visual_use: Seamlessly tileable noise texture. Essential for repeating patterns and textile-like art.

entries.title: Rotation Noise
entries.visual_use: Rotation-based noise for directional, streaky, or fiber-like textures.

entries.title: Value Noise
entries.visual_use: Interpolated random value noise. Simpler than Perlin, good for blocky or watercolor-like textures.

entries.title: Value Noise Gradient
entries.visual_use: Value noise with gradient/derivative information for flow-field and directional art.

entries.title: SDF Morphing
entries.visual_use: Smooth animated morphing between multiple 3D SDF shapes. Use for abstract transforming sculpture art.

entries.title: Smooth Minimum (SDF Blending)
entries.visual_use: Smoothly blend multiple SDF shapes using smooth-min for organic, blob-like 3D forms.

entries.title: 3D Boolean SDF Operations
entries.visual_use: Constructive solid geometry (CSG) with 3D SDFs: union, intersection, and subtraction of shapes.

entries.title: 2D Boolean SDF Operations
entries.visual_use: Boolean operations on 2D signed distance fields for compositing flat graphic shapes.

entries.title: Surface Displacement
entries.visual_use: Add noise-based displacement to SDF surfaces for organic, rough, or alien textures on 3D forms.

entries.title: Solid Texturing (SDF)
entries.visual_use: Procedural solid texturing applied to raymarched 3D SDF objects for marble, wood, or layered material looks.

entries.title: Infinite Repetition (SDF)
entries.visual_use: Repeat 3D SDF objects infinitely using modulo operations for tiled, crystalline, or lattice structures.

entries.title: Octahedron SDF
entries.visual_use: Raymarched octahedron using SDF. Use for crystalline, gem-like, or sharp geometric 3D art.

entries.title: Polyhedra Truncation (SDF)
entries.visual_use: Generate truncated polyhedra (Archimedean solids) via SDF operations for precise architectural 3D forms.

entries.title: 1D Hash Functions
entries.visual_use: GPU-friendly 1D hash for fast deterministic pseudo-random values. Used as a building block in noise shaders.

entries.title: Multi-dimensional Hash
entries.visual_use: 2D/3D hash functions as building blocks for Voronoi, Worley, and other noise algorithms.

entries.title: Posterization
entries.visual_use: Reduce color bands for a posterized, screen-print, or retro graphic poster look.

entries.title: Polar Coordinates
entries.visual_use: Transform UV to polar coordinates for radial, mandala-like, and circular generative patterns.

entries.title: Polar Rotation
entries.visual_use: Polar coordinate rotation for spinning, rotating radial art and kaleidoscope effects.

entries.title: Belousov-Zhabotinsky Reaction
entries.visual_use: Produces self-organizing spiral waves and concentric target patterns. Use for ethereal, hypnotic rotating wave art.

entries.title: Lenia Continuous Cellular Automaton
entries.visual_use: Continuous Game of Life that produces gliding life-like creatures. Use for organic, living, emergent pattern art.

entries.title: Turing Patterns (Gierer-Meinhardt)
entries.visual_use: Gierer-Meinhardt activator-inhibitor system producing animal coat patterns: spots, stripes, labyrinths.

entries.title: Ant Colony Pheromone Trails
entries.visual_use: Ants deposit glowing pheromone trails that form organic networks. Use for trail-network, flow-line, or connection-graph art.

entries.title: Predator-Prey Flocking
entries.visual_use: Flock of prey with emergent escape maneuvers under predator threat. Use for dynamic, tension-filled swarm art.

entries.title: Volumetric Fog
entries.visual_use: Ray-marched 3D FBM fog/cloud with directional lighting. Use for atmospheric depth, dreamy cloudscape, or ethereal cosmic art.

entries.title: 3D L-System (Fractal Tree)
entries.visual_use: 3D branching tree and plant structures via L-system symbol rewriting. Use for botanical, forest, coral, or fractal-growth art.

entries.title: Point Cloud Morphing
entries.visual_use: 3D point cloud that smoothly morphs between sphere, torus, cube, and helix. Use for sculptural, transformative, or data-art aesthetics.
